headline: Why BSX Stock Hands You So Much Cash Right Now
summary: The market is offering a steep discount on this medical device maker, but the price tag comes with a story about slowing growth. Here’s how to read it.

headline: Becton, Dickinson and Company Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company will release its third-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.
